name: Desktop UI Shell Refactor Planning Container
overview: Hold the lightweight active planning artifacts while the full Tauri replatform document is being rewritten.
content: This file is tool metadata only. Human-readable planning content now lives in plan.md, handoff.md, open-questions.md, and validation.md.
openQuestions: Whether the frontend should finally lock to React or Vue.
Whether the Worker should use a fixed localhost port or a runtime-selected port.
Whether the new shell directory should be frozen as tauri or use another explicit name.
